'''chofathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wreathy|wreathy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wreathy|wreathy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chofathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofathithi|chofathithi]] || [[word:chofathiji|chofathiji]] || [[word:chofathishi|chofathishi]] || [[word:chofathiki|chofathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofathuthuthu|chofathuthuthu]] || [[word:chofathujuju|chofathujuju]] || [[word:chofathushushu|chofathushushu]] || [[word:chofathukuku|chofathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofathuthu|chofathuthu]] || [[word:chofathuju|chofathuju]] || [[word:chofathushu|chofathushu]] || [[word:chofathuku|chofathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofathufthuf|chofathufthuf]] || [[word:chofathufjuf|chofathufjuf]] || [[word:chofathufshuf|chofathufshuf]] || [[word:chofathufkuf|chofathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofathethe|chofathethe]] || [[word:chofatheje|chofatheje]] || [[word:chofatheshe|chofatheshe]] || [[word:chofatheke|chofatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofathothotho|chofathothotho]] || [[word:chofathojojo|chofathojojo]] || [[word:chofathoshosho|chofathoshosho]] || [[word:chofathokoko|chofathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofathotho|chofathotho]] || [[word:chofathojo|chofathojo]] || [[word:chofathosho|chofathosho]] || [[word:chofathoko|chofathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofathofthof|chofathofthof]] || [[word:chofathofjof|chofathofjof]] || [[word:chofathofshof|chofathofshof]] || [[word:chofathofkof|chofathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfthĂŻf|chofathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfjĂŻf|chofathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfshĂŻf|chofathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfkĂŻf|chofathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chofathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chofathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chofathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chofathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfthĂŻf|chofathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfjĂŻf|chofathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfshĂŻf|chofathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfkĂŻf|chofathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfthĂŻf|chofathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfjĂŻf|chofathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfshĂŻf|chofathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chofathĂŻfkĂŻf|chofathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofathĂŠthĂŠ|chofathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chofathĂŠjĂŠ|chofathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chofathĂŠshĂŠ|chofathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chofathĂŠkĂŠ|chofathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofathathatha|chofathathatha]] || [[word:chofathajaja|chofathajaja]] || [[word:chofathashasha|chofathashasha]] || [[word:chofathakaka|chofathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofathatha|chofathatha]] || [[word:chofathaja|chofathaja]] || [[word:chofathasha|chofathasha]] || [[word:chofathaka|chofathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofathafthaf|chofathafthaf]] || [[word:chofathafjaf|chofathafjaf]] || [[word:chofathafshaf|chofathafshaf]] || [[word:chofathafkaf|chofathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chofathasha|chofathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofathshĂ«sha|chofathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofathrosha|chofathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofathmusha|chofathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofathyasha|chofathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofathnkshĂ«sha|gochofathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofathnkrosha|gochofathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofathnkmusha|gochofathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofathnkyasha|gochofathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chofafathasha|chofafathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofafathshĂ«sha|chofafathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofafathrosha|chofafathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofafathmusha|chofafathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofafathyasha|chofafathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofafathnkshĂ«sha|gochofafathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofafathnkrosha|gochofafathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofafathnkmusha|gochofafathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofafathnkyasha|gochofafathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chefĂŠthasha|chefĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chefĂŠthshĂ«sha|chefĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chefĂŠthrosha|chefĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chefĂŠthmusha|chefĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chefĂŠthyasha|chefĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochefĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gochefĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochefĂŠthnkrosha|gochefĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochefĂŠthnkmusha|gochefĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochefĂŠthnkyasha|gochefĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chofathasha|chofathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofathshĂ«sha|chofathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofathrosha|chofathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofathmusha|chofathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofathyasha|chofathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofathnkshĂ«sha|gochofathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofathnkrosha|gochofathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofathnkmusha|gochofathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofathnkyasha|gochofathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
